Hlif traveled to the Far Shiverpeaks to challenge Jormag. Near death, she took one last swing at her foe before falling unconscious. She awoke the next morning—her axe encased in an icy dragon's head.
Hmmm. Dredge and charr, working together. Charrdge? Dreharr? And just how do two xenophobic cultures align with each other?

Hoelbrak has become the social center of the norn race. When the Elder Dragon Jormag drove norn ancestors out of the Far Shiverpeaks, the Spirits of the Wild—Bear, Raven, Wolf, and Snow Leopard—guided them to this area, and now great halls dedicated to those spirits dominate the settlement.

Holding down the security of the fractals best we can; ward is stretched thin. All of your aid, from the smallest task to the most severe, only helps us. Thank you for that.Once you banished the demon, my attention was drawn to a peculiar object on the ground. It doesn't look like any playing card I've ever seen, but I think you may find it interesting nonetheless.I will continue to keep R'tchikk safe from harm. Take care of yourself in return.
